title: RBI Monetary Penalties on Union Bank, Central Bank of India, Bank of India, and Pine Labs
description: <cite index="28-4">The RBI imposed monetary penalties on Union Bank of India, Central Bank of India, Bank of India, and fintech firm Pine Labs for regulatory non-compliance.</cite> <cite index="28-8,28-9">Union Bank was penalised for delays in crediting customer accounts in unauthorised transaction cases, while Bank of India faced action for lapses in priority sector lending norms. Central Bank of India was penalised for deficiencies in KYC and financial inclusion norms.</cite>
